import React,{useState}from"react";import{useDispatch,useSelector}from"react-redux";import{createCustomer,fetchCustomers}from"./store/customersSlice";import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";function CustomerForm(){const dispatch=useDispatch();const creating=useSelector(s=>s.customers.creating);const[customer,setCustomer]=useState({firstName:"",lastName:"",dateOfBirth:""});const submit=async e=>{e.preventDefault();// backend expects fields: firstName, lastName, dateOfBirth
await dispatch(createCustomer(customer)).unwrap();setCustomer({firstName:"",lastName:"",dateOfBirth:""});dispatch(fetchCustomers());};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("form",{onSubmit:submit,children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{placeholder:"First Name",value:customer.firstName,onChange:e=>setCustomer({...customer,firstName:e.target.value})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{placeholder:"Last Name",value:customer.lastName,onChange:e=>setCustomer({...customer,lastName:e.target.value})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{type:"date",value:customer.dateOfBirth,onChange:e=>setCustomer({...customer,dateOfBirth:e.target.value})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{type:"submit",disabled:creating,children:creating?"Saving...":"Save"})]});}export default CustomerForm;
